Hello gentlemen,
I dove deep into your brand trying to get a grasp on everything you do, and where I can help. I'll start with an unbiased
audit of your current activities for SEO and PPC, then we'll focus on socialfollowed up with a review of the funnel you
wanted me to inspect.
Your overall site traffic: You have 85% of your traffic coming from PPC, which is pay per click aka paid traffic. This drew
my interest because it means you have significant room for improvement with the ability to acquire traffic through both
SEO & PPC efforts.
It's also important to point out the numbers below are from your 1 year averages of traffic volume from each source.
Let's look closer at the history of your organic traffic (SEO): Here we see you're getting more traction in recent months. It
appears you have historical evidence of getting effected by the Google search engine updates. Whatever you're doing as
of recently though, keep doing it!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

I'd like to transition to your landing page now. It's great, I love it! I tested your funnel and have a major improvement that
would drive revenues for you dependent on how many leads your initial call to action to watch the video gets: Add a call to
action button that converts me into a customer here. After you collect my info, email me right away pushing me back to
what you showed me here you wanting me to buy.
You can then follow up with me right away based on my new actions or lack of action as a lead. Meaning, If I didn't watch
or buy your product here, market something else to me to me since I didn't respond to that! It's a powerful way to drive
lead engagement that turns leads into customers quicker and in higher volumes.
On Facebook, I found your personal profile but did not see a public figure or company page. Do you have one? Let me
know please, this is important.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

organic content distributions (blogs, youtube, social media content, etc)

websites

email marketing
marketing automation
creative services (we handle your graphic design needs)
